title: Little Days - Vividly, with the Whole Family: Free Original Quality Baby Album
homeHeroTitlePart:
Capture every moment
of your child vividly
homeHeroDesc1:
Little Days: A free, unlimited baby album service
that preserves your baby's photos in their original quality.
homeHeroDesc2: Record every moment of your growing child in high definition.
homeHeroCardTop:
Unlimited photos
no matter how many!
homeTimeline1Title:
Upload your photos,
and they'll organize themselves
homeTimeline1Desc:
The app automatically reads the capture date and places photos on a timeline.
From the day they were born to today,
see their growth journey at a glance!
homeTimeline2Title:
Share your love
with a single 'Like'
homeTimeline2Desc:
A small heart and a short comment come together
to create precious family memories.
Stay connected and share your child's daily life with family, no matter the distance
homeTimeline3Eyebrow: A Space for Invited Family Only
homeTimeline3Desc:
Only family members you personally invite can join your Little Days album.
Access is granted only via invitation codes,
so you can safely share your family's precious daily life.
homeTimeline4Title:
No worries, no matter
how many photos you have
homeTimeline4Desc:
Record every moment of your fast-growing child without worrying about storage!
Little Days safely stores thousands of photos in their original quality,
with no limits.
homeSafetyTitle:
The safest space
designed for your baby
homeSafetyCard1Desc:
No one but invited family members can see your photos.
Never worry about unauthorized use or external exposure of your child's pictures.
homeSafetyCard2Title: Completely Free with No Hidden Fees!
homeSafetyCard2Desc:
Enjoy all features for free with no additional payments!
We know raising a child is busy enough as it is.
homeSafetyCard3Desc:
We never compress or convert your photos to low quality.
Save them exactly as they were taken and download the original files anytime.
homeTestimonialsReview1: It was so tedious sending photos separately to both sides of the family, but now I only have to upload once. Both grandmothers absolutely love it!
homeTestimonialsReview2: I always felt bad asking for photos over KakaoTalk, but now my granddaughter's photos are always there when I open the app. I check in every day to like and comment. I'm so happy.
homeTestimonialsReview3: Both sets of grandparents living in the countryside love seeing their grandchild's photos through the app. It feels like our family has grown closer.
homeTestimonialsReview4: I felt bad asking my busy son for photos. But with this, I can see them whenever I want. I couldn't sleep after seeing my grandson's smiling face.
homeTestimonialsReview5: Since installing the app, grandma looks at her grandchild's photos every morning. She calls us much more often now. It really feels like the family is closer.
homeTestimonialsReview6: I love getting instant notifications whenever a photo is uploaded. Even though we live far away, it feels like the baby is right here with me every day.
homeCtaTitle:
Your child is growing even today.
Don't miss a single moment.
homeCtaDesc: Start recording your child's precious moments with Little Days!
inviteDescription: If you're part of {{name}}'s family, join {{app}} and stay updated on your little one's everyday moments!
